title: ivk_decryption test: note_diversifier and note_pk_d assertions never uncommented
description: wallet/tests/ivk_decryption.rs::sapling_test_vector_decryption has commented-out assertions for note.note_diversifier and note.note_pk_d with the comment 'Uncomment when Note gains plaintext fields'. Note already has note_diversifier: Option<Vec<u8>> and note_pk_d: Option<Vec<u8>> (added in migration v6 / scanner rewrite). The assertions were never activated, leaving a gap: a bug in how SaplingIvkDecryptor stores diversifier or pk_d bytes would not be caught by this test even though a test-vector oracle exists.
